title: White Chocolate Craisin Cookies
instructions:
Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
Cream the butter and sugars together until fluffy. Beat in the eggs and the vanilla. Set aside.
In another bowl combine the flour, baking soda and salt.
Add the flour mixture to the butter and sugar a cup at a time, blending well after each addition. Add the craisins, white chocolate chips and macadamias. Mix well.
Using heaping spoonfuls place the dough on the cookie sheet and bake for 11-15 minutes.
